data.description: JP Morgan boosts Rolls-Royce price forecast to 1,500p from 1,320p.

data.title: Wendy's is Giving Away Free Fries and Frosty on Tuesday, April 7 Thanks to One Iconic Slam Dunk
data.description: Fans have the unique opportunity to enjoy Wendy's famous dunk for no cost on a single day – featuring the beloved combo of Fries and Frosty. This exciting offer is part of a limited-time promotion happening in Dublin, Ohio on April 6, 2026. The renowned dunk took place amid the NCAA® Division I Men's Basketball National Championship Game. Wendy's is providing this special promotion, unlocking an experience that has captured the attention of many.

data.title: Chaos Labs steps down as Aave's risk provider for Aave V4, citing unwillingness to take on new risks.
data.description: Chaos Labs, a DeFi risk management firm, raised concerns about Aave's transition to Aave V4, citing risks they were hesitant to accept. Aave countered by stating that Chaos sought exclusive authority as the primary risk service provider, a position the platform was unwilling to concede.

data.title: Xinhua Silk Road: E China urban district wraps up Flower Festival activities with eye-catching tourist flows
data.description: In a recent event at Daning Park in Jing'an, an urban district in east China's Shanghai, the Flower Festival activities concluded with a notable increase of approximately 870,000 visitors. In addition to the impressive drone light and shadow display, a variety of other attractions and events were held to entertain the large number of tourists.
